coldOpen.measurement: performance.now() from ctrl+K keydown dispatch to cmdk-root present in DOM, after navigating to /admin/plans

warmOpen.measurement: performance.now() from ctrl+K keydown to cmdk-root after a previous open+close cycle

note: Measurements taken on local dev server (Turbopack) with already-compiled route. Real-world cold-open on Vercel sin1 will include network roundtrip to /api/plans/search after first keystroke, which is covered by the <link rel=preconnect> hint in admin/layout.tsx (T157 critique P8).
